title: Morphological single cell profiling of the epithelial-mesenchymal transition.
author: Leggett SE Sim JY Rubins JE Neronha ZJ Williams EK Wong IY
content: S-EPMC5417362 PMC5417362 Morphological single cell profiling of the epithelial-mesenchymal transition. Single cells respond heterogeneously to biochemical treatments, which can complicate the analysis of in vitro and in vivo experiments. In particular, stressful perturbations may induce
